home.tagline: Join us for our wedding celebrations
home.welcomeText: After years of adventures together, we're finally making it official! We would be honored to have you celebrate with us at the beautiful Château de Blier in the heart of the Belgian Ardennes.
home.dressCodeText: Formal or semi-formal attire. Feel free to wear any color or pattern you wish — just maybe not white!
home.photographyText: Our guests will be our photographers! Share your pictures via the QR code at the venue. There's also a fun photo corner!
home.giftsText: Your presence is the best gift! If you wish to give something, we'd appreciate a contribution toward our future plans.
home.rsvpCardText: Let us know you're coming and your accommodation preferences
home.chateauDescription: A charming 19th-century château nestled in the heart of the Belgian Ardennes. With its beautiful gardens, rustic interiors, and peaceful surroundings, it's the perfect setting for our celebration.
home.bookRoom: Arrange your accommodation when you RSVP
home.questionsText: Feel free to reach out to us anytime

venue.title: The Venue
venue.subtitle: Château de Blier, Belgium
venue.whyThisPlaceText1: During a trip to Belgium, we stumbled upon Château de Blier—and the moment we stepped through the gates, we felt something magical. There's an atmosphere here that's impossible to describe: the way the light filters through the ancient trees, the quiet elegance of the stone walls, and a sense that this place has been waiting for love stories like ours.
venue.whyThisPlaceText2: We knew instantly this was where we wanted to celebrate with the people who matter most to us. We can't wait to share this feeling with you.
venue.aboutChateauText1: Château de Blier is a 19th-century castle nestled in the heart of the Belgian Ardennes. With its timeless architecture, peaceful gardens, and sweeping views of the countryside, it offers an atmosphere of romance and elegance that captivated us from the first moment.
venue.aboutChateauText2: The estate features grand reception halls for celebrating, intimate garden corners for quiet conversations, and comfortable accommodations so you can stay close to the festivities. Every detail of this place feels like it was designed for making memories.
venue.planYourJourneyText: Let us help you find your way to us
venue.byCarText: From Brussels, take the E411 towards Luxembourg. Exit at Marche-en-Famenne and follow signs to Erezee. Free parking is available at the venue.
venue.byTrainText: The nearest station is Marche-en-Famenne. From there, taxi service is available, or consider car pooling with other guests.
venue.carPoolingText: Consider coordinating with other guests traveling from the same area to share rides. It's a great way to meet fellow guests before the celebration!
venue.freeParking: Free parking is available at the venue for all guests.

weekend.title: The Weekend
weekend.subtitle: Join us for a full weekend of celebration
weekend.introText: We would love for you to join us for the entire weekend! The château and surrounding area offer plenty of opportunities for relaxation and fun activities.
weekend.packlistSubtitle: What to bring for the weekend
weekend.packlistItem3: Change of clothes for two nights
weekend.packlistNote: It might be hot! Don't forget to bring enough water for the weekend.
weekend.fridayIntro: Arrive at Château de Blier from 5PM onwards. We'd really appreciate it if you could lend us a hand to organize the venue — and we'll dine together afterwards!
weekend.arrivalCheckinDesc: Check into your accommodation and take time to explore the beautiful grounds.
weekend.welcomeDrinksDinnerDesc: Let's spend time together casually or feel free to organize your own plans.
weekend.saturdayIntro: The wedding day — let's start with brunch from 9:30 AM before getting ready for the festivities.
weekend.brunchDesc: A leisurely brunch together before getting ready for the festivities.
weekend.weddingCeremonyDesc: Our ceremony will take place in the château's enchanting garden (weather permitting), surrounded by all our loved ones.
weekend.cocktailReceptionDesc: Following the ceremony, join us on the terrace for champagne, canapes, and games. Don't forget to take some photos!
weekend.dinnerDesc: Enjoy a delicious buffet from a local gourmet chef. Dine in the festive dining room or at the picnic tables outside.
weekend.cakeCuttingDesc: Time to cut the wedding cake! Make sure you save room for a piece.
weekend.firstDancePartyDesc: Watch our first dance, then dance the night away! The bar will be open and drinks are on us!
weekend.sundayIntro: A big communal breakfast where everyone contributes — it's early, but we need to check out by 11 AM. It was great celebrating with you!
weekend.postWeddingBreakfastDesc: A big communal breakfast where everyone contributes. Bring something to share!
weekend.checkoutFarewellDesc: Time to say goodbye! If you have time afterwards, explore the region.

accommodation.title: Accommodation
accommodation.subtitle: Where to stay during the wedding weekend
accommodation.chooseAccommodation: Choose the accommodation that suits you best
accommodation.stayWithUs: Stay with us at the castle
accommodation.campingDesc: Nearby at Domaine Le Val de l'Aisne
accommodation.chateauIntro: Come and join us for the whole weekend at the Château from Friday to Sunday with lots of fun, joy and laughter in a true family spirit. The château has 20 rooms and 60 beds available for our guests. Family first, then first-come-first-serve. Only want to spend one night? Let us know!
accommodation.preferenceNoticeDesc: By indicating your preferences, you are not booking a room directly. We will collect everyone's preferences and assign rooms accordingly.
accommodation.roomPreferences: Indicate your room preferences when RSVP-ing — we'll do our best to accommodate!
accommodation.campingNote: *If you wish to camp in tents on the property (or with your caravan), please let us know in advance so that we can verify with the owners whether this is possible.
accommodation.nearbyCampingIntro: Do you prefer to stay at a more quiet place with more privacy and calm? Do you like to camp with your caravan or in a tent or glamp in a luxurious dome, or a safari-tent? No problem, because another great and nearby accommodation possibility would be the Camping place "Domaine Le Val de l'Aisne" right across the wedding location, only 450m away (6 minutes by foot across the street).
accommodation.consultWebpage: Please consult the webpage directly for more information:
accommodation.languageHelp: *Should you have difficulties with the language (NL or FR), please do not hesitate to contact us to help you book your place.
accommodation.holidayHomesTitle: Holiday homes or Airbnbs in the Region
accommodation.holidayHomesIntro: If you prefer to stay in a secluded holiday home with more privacy, you can also check the various possibilities in the Area via AirBnB or Booking.com. However, be aware of the distance to the wedding venue, it might not seem far on the map but commuting in the region sometimes takes more time than expected.
accommodation.airbnbDesc: Browse holiday homes and apartments in Erezée
accommodation.bookingDesc: Find hotels and B&Bs near Erezée
accommodation.needHelpText: If you need assistance with accommodation bookings or have language difficulties, please don't hesitate to contact us.

surrounding.title: The Surrounding
surrounding.subtitle: Explore the Belgian Ardennes
surrounding.intro: The Belgian Ardennes is a beautiful region with plenty to see and do. Whether you love outdoor adventures, exploring caves, or simply enjoying the peaceful countryside, there is something for everyone.
surrounding.nearbyVillageDesc: Durbuy is often called the smallest city in the world and is known for its charming medieval streets along the Ourthe River in the Belgian Ardennes. It is a popular destination for outdoor activities like hiking and kayaking, as well as cozy cafés and local restaurants.
surrounding.kayakingDesc: Sail on the clear water of the Ourthe river, surrounded by the natural beauty of the Ardennes. Paddle through the breathtaking landscapes of the region, while enjoying a moment of relaxation and adventure with family and friends.
surrounding.cavesHottonDesc: About a short drive away, these fascinating natural caves are one of Wallonia's most impressive underground systems. You can explore stalactite and stalagmite galleries — a great rainy-day activity and a striking contrast to the Ardennes' outdoor scenery.
surrounding.treetopParcDesc: From footbridges to cabins, discover the trail of the parc which is 200 meters long and more than 15 meters high. It allows you and your little ones to discover the forest up close!
surrounding.hikingTripsDesc: Go on a hiking trip in the Ardennes, where forested hills, river valleys, and scenic viewpoints create the perfect escape into nature.
surrounding.animalParcDesc: This 10 ha park offers you the opportunity to observe the inhabitants of our forests in their natural habitat. You will meet a herd of fallow deer, mouflon, a herd of wild boar, wolves, lynxes, foxes, and eagle-owls...
surrounding.planningToExploreText: If you're staying for the full weekend, Sunday morning is a great time to visit the surrounding area before heading home!

rsvp.title: RSVP
rsvp.subtitle: Let us know you're coming
rsvp.additionalGuests: Please enter the names of your additional guests:
rsvp.roomPreferenceText: Choose the room type that best fits your group. Prices are for 2 nights (Friday & Saturday).
rsvp.campingOptionText: Please note: We need to verify with the owners if this is possible. There may be a small additional fee.
rsvp.dietaryRequirementsText: Please let us know if you or your guests have any dietary requirements.
rsvp.anythingElsePlaceholder: Accessibility needs, special requests, or anything else we should know...
rsvp.missYouText: Thank you for letting us know. We hope to celebrate with you another time!
rsvp.seeYouText: We're so excited to celebrate with you at Château de Blier. We'll be in touch with more details soon!
rsvp.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.

page-not-found.title: Page Not Found
page-not-found.subtitle: Oops! Lost in the Ardennes?
page-not-found.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

madagascar.title: Madagascar
madagascar.subtitle: 14 November 2026
madagascar.comingSoonText: We're excited to share more details about our Madagascar celebration. Stay tuned for updates on the venue, accommodations, and activities.
madagascar.newsletterSubtitle: Subscribe to receive updates about our Madagascar wedding
madagascar.subscribeSuccess: Thank you! You'll receive updates soon.
madagascar.subscribeError: Please enter a valid email address.
